title: Energizer CR2025 Batteries (2 Pack) - Lithium 3V Coin Battery - Car Key Fobs, Watches, Home/Medical/Fitness Devices - 10 Year Shelf Life - Child Resistant Packaging
features: 2-pack of Energizer CR2025 Lithium coin batteries
Long Lasting: Each lithium battery holds power for up to 10 years in storage, so they’re always ready when you need them
Trusted Power: Delivers long-lasting, dependable performance in speciality devices like heart rate monitors, remotes, keyless entry systems, calculators and toys
Safe: Energizer Lithium coin batteries are secured in child-resistant packaging
Reliable: These Energizer CR2025 lithium batteries perform in extreme temperatures, withstanding -30º to 60º C
Energizer Innovation: From the makers of the world’s longest-lasting AA batteries, Energizer Ultimate Lithium
description: Product Description This Energizer Lithium Coin 3-Volt Battery delivers big time on long-lasting, dependable power for your coin-battery-operated items. From heart rate or glucose monitors, to remotes, keyless entry systems, key fobs, watches, toys and games, and even more specialized devices, our coin batteries are compatible with the devices that fit your life, so you can keep going. Box Contains Disposable Batteries
